guide.title: How to Use the Planner

steps.title: Select Dolls
steps.description: In the Character tab, select the Tactical Dolls you want to develop and set their current/target levels and skills.

steps.title: Select Weapons
steps.description: In the Weapon tab, select dedicated weapons and set their target levels.

steps.title: Check Planner
steps.description: In the Planner tab, review required materials. Click any material card to view details and update quantities.

steps.title: Manage Inventory
steps.description: Enter your owned materials in the Inventory tab to automatically calculate what you still need.

notes: Each ascension phase requires dedicated materials.
